creator: dinoex@FreeBSD.org
text:
Works as documented.
The port "print/libpaper" does not install a default file.

$ man paperconfig
[...]
FILES
       ${prefix}/etc/papersize
                           Contains  the name of the system-wide default paper
                           size to be used if the PAPERSIZE  variable  is  not
                           set.
[...]

$ a2ps
a2ps: unknown medium `libpaper'

$ env PAPERSIZE=letter a2ps
^C

$ env PAPERSIZE=a4 a2ps
^C

$ cp /usr/local/etc/papersize.a4 /usr/local/etc/papersize
$ a2ps
^C
